LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS CHUBB CORPORATION AND EXECUTIVE RISK INDEMNITY INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION ONE BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT AND CANNOT PLEAD AS TO THESE DEFENDANTS THAT THEY WERE DEBTORS WHO WRONGFULLY TRANSFERRED MONEY TO AVOID PAYING THE DEBT. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION TWO BECAUSES PLAINTIFF DOES NOT AND CANNOT PLEAD THAT THESE DEFENDANTS WRONGFULLY ACQUIRED PROPERTY THAT THEY NOW HOLD ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION THREE AND SIX TO PLEAD HOW THESE DEFENDANTS WRONGFULLY INTERFERED WITH PLAINTIFF'S RELATIONSHIP WITH THE OTHER DEFENDANTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189

SEAN D. WHITE, ESQ. (ARCHER NORRIS), (925)930-6600 X220, FOR DEFENDANTS/MOVING PARTIES, CHUBB INSURANCE, EXECUTIVE RISK INDEMNITY INC.
STEVEN A. DILLICK, ESQ., (415)399-8777, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, SANDRA EASTBURN

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS CHUBB INSURANCE, EXECUTIVE RISK INDEMNITY INC.'S Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 AND 6. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 7. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 8 TO PLEAD DEFENDANT BENEFITED FROM THE ALLEGED BREACH OF DUTY. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB/ER)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. STEVEN A. DILLICK, TEL. NO. 399-8777 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CRAIG PINEDO OF SHEPPARD MULLIN, TEL. NO. 774-3296 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANTS KIT COLE INVESTMENT TRUST, TOM HYDE, THE HYDE LAW CORPORATION, KIT COLE'S MOTION AND SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THE GRAVAMEN OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT, WHICH IS DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT IN PROCURING, SECRETING AND FAILING TO PAY TO PLAINTIFF THE INSURANCE PROCEEDS IS NOT PROTECTED CONDUCT UNDER C C P 425.16(E). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/AL

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Sean White, Esq. of Archer Norris, 925-930-6600 for defendant and moving party Chubb Corp. & Executive Risk Indemnity
Steven Dillick, Esq., 415-399-8777 for plaintiff and opposing party Sandra Eastburn

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT CHUBB CORPORATION AND EXECUTIVE RISK INDEMNITY INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION ONE BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT AND CANNOT PLEAD AS TO THESE DEFENDANTS THAT THEY WERE DEBTORS WHO WRONGFULLY TRANSFERRED MONEY TO AVOID PAYING THE DEBT. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION TWO BECAUSES PLAINTIFF DOES NOT AND CANNOT PLEAD THAT THESE DEFENDANTS WRONGFULLY ACQUIRED PROPERTY THAT THEY NOW HOLD ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION'S THREE AND SIX TO PLEAD HOW THESE DEFENDANTS WRONGFULLY INTERFERED WITH PLAINTIFF'S RELATIONSHIP WITH THE OTHER DEFENDANTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB/AL)
